situation: audit-2026-07-03-007 H01 finding: distill-patterns.py SUCCESS_OUTCOMES={success,partial_success} and FAILURE_OUTCOMES={failure,user_rejected,aborted} completely mismatch actual case schema which uses succeeded/failed/superseded/blocked/merged/rejected. 305 of 324 cases use 'succeeded' — all classified as indeterminate, making accuracy data entirely unreliable.
